name: Autumn Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Potatoes, diced into ½-inch cubes
A few leaves of dried basil
6 Whole fresh tomatoes, stems removed and cut into eighths
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the lean ground beef, crumbled, into a deep, 3-quart, heat-resistant, non-metallic casserole dish. Heat uncovered in the Microwave Oven for 5 minutes or until the meat is browned. Stir occasionally.
2. Drain any excess fat from the beef.
3. Add the finely chopped onions and continue to heat, uncovered, in the Microwave Oven for 2 minutes or until the onions are tender.
4. Add hot water, carrots, celery, potatoes, and seasoning. Mix thoroughly.
5. Heat covered in the Microwave Oven for 10 minutes or until the water comes to a boil.
6. Add the tomatoes to the soup and continue to heat covered in the Microwave Oven for 5 minutes or until the tomatoes are tender.
